body:
## Summary
Complete backend persistence layer: implement stubbed routes, wire game results to MongoDB, add integration tests.

## Changes

### Routes (converted .js → .ts)
- **matches.ts**: `GET /api/matches` (paginated, filter by userId), `GET /api/matches/:id`, `GET /api/matches/:id/replay` (protected)
- **achievements.ts**: `GET /api/achievements` (reads from DB)

### Runtime persistence
- `pve/runtime.ts`: turn data recording per round, auto-archive `Match` + `MatchReplay` on game end (WIN/LOSE)
- `lib/savepoint.ts`: restored pure data functions (create/restore/validate) alongside Mongoose CRUD (saveGame/loadGame/clearSave)

### Integration tests (4 new)
- Full multi-round game flow (play until WIN or LOSE)
- One-shot boss kill (WIN scenario)
- Skill + shuffle both usable in same player phase
- Shield blocks charge burst and shatters

## Test plan
- [x] `tsc --noEmit` — zero type errors
- [x] `npm run lint` — zero errors
- [x] 199 total unit tests passing
title: feat(db): implement routes, game archive, and integration tests (Steps 8+9)
